choice: Withdrawal strategy is a per-Scenario input with three types in v1: (1) post-tax-first (default), (2) tax-deferred-first (Excel behavior), (3) blend schedule — a list of (year-or-age, post-tax %) control points defining a time-varying split of spending between buckets, stepped/interpolated between points. RMDs act as a floor on tax-deferred withdrawals under every strategy. Optimizing strategies (bracket-filling, Roth conversion) deferred past v1.
rationale: User confirmed strategy-as-input and explicitly requested the dynamic time-keyed blend
